ascend_skill.desc:
At the start of battle, Mayumi gains 90 Velocity stacks. At the end of each ally's action, gain 4 Velocity stacks (if Mayumi's Speed is over 100, gain 1 more Velocity stack for every 10 points of Speed over 100; up to 6 stacks).
At the start of Mayumi's turn, if Velocity is over 120 stacks, can spend Velocity to gain an extra action at the end of her current action (cooldown: 1 turn). When total Velocity stacks gained during battle reach 100/220/350 stacks, activate level 1/2/3 of Torque Boost.
Torque Boost: Increase party's pierce rate by 5%/10%/15%.
ascend_skill.name: Racing Game Lover

ascend_skill.desc:
At the end of each ally's action, gain 10 more Velocity stacks.
On an extra action, when using a skill different from the one used immediately before, activate the following additional effects.
Shockwave: When activating a skill, increase critical damage by 50%.
Aero Setup: Increase shield by 30%. Also, increase party's Defense by 30% more.
Power Setup: Increase main target's pierce rate by 10% more.
ascend_skill.name: Tire Change

ascend_skill.desc:
When activating Torque Boost, activate the following additional effects.
Level 1: Increase party's critical damage by 20%.
Level 2: Increase party's damage by 20%.
Level 3: Increase party's Attack by 30%.
ascend_skill.name: High-Spec Engine

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Power Setup and Thief Tactics by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Output Control

ascend_skill.desc: Highlight Enhanced: Increase party's damage by 10% more. Also, extend the duration of the Highlight's buffs by 1 turn.
ascend_skill.name: Pole Position

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Shockwave and Aero Setup by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Aerodynamic Control

ascend_skill.desc:
The amount of Velocity stacks gained at the start of battle becomes 120. On Mayumi's extra action, spend 40 or 80 Velocity stacks, and activate the following additional effects the next time a skill is activated.
40 Velocity spent
Shockwave: When activating a skill, increase Mayumi's critical rate by 20%. If the target is knocked down, increase party's Attack by 25% for 2 turns.
Aero Setup: Increase shield by 20%. Also, extend the shield duration by 1 turn.
Power Setup: When used on an extra turn, change buff target from main target to all allies.
80 Velocity spent
Shockwave: Increase party's damage dealt to downed foes by 15% for 1 turn.
Aero Setup: Decrease party's damage taken by 20% for 1 turn.
Power Setup: Increase party's damage dealt by 25% for 1 turn.
ascend_skill.name: Circuit Queen

highlight_skill.desc: Increase party's Attack by 5.9%/6.5%/6.2%/6.8% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 1.33% more, up to a maximum of 23.4%/25.8%/24.9%/27.3%). Also, increase party's damage by 5.9%/6.5%/6.2%/6.8% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 1.33% more, up to a maximum of 23.4%/25.8%/24.9%/27.3%). Also, when the selected ally of this Highlight next deals direct damage to foes, decrease the selected foe's Down Points by 1 more.
highlight_skill.name: Highlight

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Physical damage to all foes equal to 134.2%/148.0%/142.5%/156.2% of Attack.
Also, increase party's damage by 8.8%/9.7%/9.3%/10.2% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 2% more, up to a maximum of 35.1%/38.7%/37.3%/40.9%).
When used on an extra action, increase skill damage by 50%, and activate a guaranteed critical hit on the main target.
normal_skill.name: Shockwave

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's Attack by 8.8%/9.7%/9.3%/10.2% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 2% more, up to a maximum of 35.1%/38.7%/37.3%/40.9%). Also, increase party's Defense by 9.8%/10.8%/10.4%/11.4% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 2.22% more, up to a maximum of 39.0%/43.0%/41.4%/45.4%).
When used on an extra action, grant a shield to all allies equal to 2204/2354/2294/2444. This effect lasts for 2 turns.
normal_skill.name: Aero Setup

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's pierce rate by 1.0%/1.1%/1.0%/1.1% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 0.22% more, up to a maximum of 3.9%/4.3%/4.1%/4.5%). Also, increase party's Attack by 12.7%/14.0%/13.5%/14.8% for 2 turns (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 2.89% more, up to a maximum of 50.8%/56.0%/53.9%/59.1%).
When used on an extra action, also increase the main target's pierce rate by 2.0%/2.2%/2.1%/2.3% for 1 turn (for every 10 points of Speed, increase by 0.44% more, up to a maximum of 7.8%/8.6%/8.3%/9.1%).
normal_skill.name: Power Setup

passive_skill.desc: When Mayumi is present, increase party's damage during extra actions by 45.0%.
passive_skill.name: Team Ambassador

passive_skill.desc: When Mayumi is present, increase party's damage dealt to downed foes by 30.0%. Also, when Mayumi knocks down a foe, deal more Physical damage equal to 60.0% of Attack.
passive_skill.name: Overtaking
